reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para pasar, en encuentro de rutas y acceso al pueblo. Estación de servicio, con servicompras, estacionamiento y sanitarios

(Translated by Google)
Good place to stop, at the intersection of routes and access to town. Gas station with convenience stores, parking, and restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzczh6LUNREAE

reviews.comment:
Estuve por unos días ,la atención brindada buena,raro pero la nafta super solamente por el día a la noche nada , después todo bien

(Translated by Google)
I was there for a few days, the service was good, strangely enough, but the premium gasoline was only available during the day, nothing at night, otherwise everything was fine
